title: selenia dissecta
intro: Selenia dissecta, also known as the fringed sedge, is a type of aquatic plant native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties that can aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Selenia dissecta include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Selenia dissecta typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's roots and leaves, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or salves for topical application.
